word: G2274 - ἡττάω - hēttáō - hayt-tah'-o - Be inferior

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to make less, inferior, to overcome
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From the same as G2276; to make worse, that is, vanquish (literally or figuratively); by implication to rate lower: - be inferior, overcome.
